channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping on corner for Hucclecote Road and Hillview Road by Pied Piper Appeal, 7th June
item.description:
Flytipping on corner for Hucclecote Road and Hillview Road by Pied Piper Appeal
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Hucclecote Road, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: See photo, it's getting bigger by the day, 7th June
item.description:
As per map, just before the substation in Porchester Road Hucclecote.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Porchester Road, Gloucester

item.title: Faded double yellow lines in front of 3 Ryeworth Road, 7th June
item.description:
3 Ryeworth Road, Charlton Kings

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenway Lane, Battledown, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Really dirty toilets, 7th June
item.description:
Really useful to have public toilets next to a kids park but they are so dirty. Can they be cleaned properly- scrubbed and bleached, toilet brushes replaced, repainted
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint Arvans Court, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Gotherington Lane and Sanderling Way roundabout, 7th June
item.description:
Complete lack of maintenance, tall weeds in gutters, 3 foot weeds almost growing into a bush on roundabout. Footpaths restricted by overgrown bushes on Sanderling Way restricting the full used of the pathways particularly for mother with pushchairs. The maintenance of this area is sadly lacking where tall weeds are allowed to grow and obscure the gutters. Very unsightly. Thank You.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Sanderling Way, Bishop's Cleeve, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Have to walk on the road with a pushchair as brambles overgrown pathway, 7th June
item.description:
All the way up Ermin street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Ermin Street, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Top half of tree has fallen down, fell on road prior to moving, 7th June
item.description:
Just outside a private road on Watts Close, next to house number 6

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watts Close, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tenant who has moved out of 4A Glenville Parade has filled the bins with wood and his household furniture and left a table in the car park and gym equipment, 7th June
item.description:
As above it was the tenant who dumped all of his household items which is cctv by the carpark which is private it is him equipment, wood the bins lids do not shut
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erminster Drive, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Part dead tree on pavement, 7th June
item.description:
On pavement outside 16 Cleevelands Drive there is a nearly dead tree

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Cleevelands Drive, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous exposed wires, 7th June
item.description:
Lampost has dangerous wires exposed. I reported this as an emergency on the 26th May on 08000514514, but no action, has been carried out.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 210, Hatherley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crumbling egde to speed bump, 7th June
item.description:
Just past junction with Gotherington Lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55,57, Station Road, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 7th June
item.description:
Pothole in-between lane approx 30 cm in diameter and 15 cm deep.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees cut and dumped, 7th June
item.description:
Trees cut and dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Calspick Way, Longlevens, Gloucester

item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Overhanging trees, 7th June
item.description:
Overhanging trees on the road between Gloucester Road and A436. From Andoversford Clock House Square to Mars Den bus stops. This is a bus route operated with double decker vehicles and they are colliding with the low branches which is a serious health and safety concern as passengers on board could be hurt.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): AND, Andoversford, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Path, 6th June
item.description:
The length of path on the even house numbers side, the length of the path is dangerously uneven, been like it more than a year, an elderly woman had tripped recently, thankfully no personal injury. Please arrange maintenance to access the damaged pathing, thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Somme Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep and wide pothole at the junction of Maple Avenue and Cherry Dr, 6th June
item.description:
Deep and wide pothole. One of several in the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Cherry Avenue, Battledown, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown grass, 6th June
item.description:
The grass verge on the right side of 20 Essex Close, GL3 1NZ is extremely overgrown. I’ve tried to maintain it myself but I don’t have the tools, and it’s now become a safety issue because my 3‑year‑old can’t safely get out of our garden gate due to the height and condition of the grass. All the other verges in the neighbourhood are being cut regularly, but this one is always missed. My house now looks like it’s next to a jungle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highgrove Way, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Builders bag full of rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
Here in a gateway and also the otherside of the motorway bridge before Sherdons golf driving range are builders bags full of flytipped rubbish
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sharp objects and flytipping, 6th June
item.description:
Not very obvious from the road but some metal spikes are protruding from the hedge, seemingly a flytipped gate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardners Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on bus stop, 6th June
item.description:
More graffiti but on Royal Well Stop D. There is also some at Stop A

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royal Well Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
